summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Dive Down Guide UI - a Roblox game guide website. All major features tested successfully including homepage, search functionality, navigation, zone cards, mutation multipliers, tips, FAQ accordion, gallery carousel, rebirth page, and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Button click intercepted by Emergent badge overlay at bottom of page

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, search bar, quick stat pills, and quick access cards
Fish search works in both hero and header dropdown - 'shark' returns 6 results, 'turtle' returns 1 result
Search result click scrolls to matching zone card and highlights fish row with blue background
Sidebar navigation shows all biomes (10 zones), special zones (2), help links, and rebirth guide link
All zone cards render properly with fish tables showing correct rarity badges and data
Mutation Multipliers section displays Ocean (Rainbow 3.0x, Gold 2.7x, etc.) and Weather (Evil 2.8x, Magma 2.5x, etc.) mutations with correct values
Tips & Tricks section shows 3 tip cards (Zone Farming, Check Rarity Conflicts, Late-Game Route)
FAQ section works - questions expand/collapse on click with smooth animation
Gallery carousel shows 6 game screenshots with continuous slide animation
Rebirth page at /rebirth shows hero, How Rebirth Works cards (3), all 10 rebirth cards with correct tier data, and final totals (+28 swim speed, +225 backpack, +2.25x cash)
Mobile navigation: hamburger menu opens/closes sidebar properly with backdrop
Header search toggle opens/closes search bar correctly
Quick access cards navigate to correct sections when clicked
Rebirth Guide card navigates to /rebirth page
Roblox badge in header points to correct URL: https://www.roblox.com/games/131756752872026/Dive-Down
Mobile search functionality works with proper results display
Design consistency: Black (#000) background, Blue (#2563EB) secondary, White accents throughout
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Scroll to top button has overlay interception issue with Emergent badge. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning to ensure button is clickable.
success_percentage: frontend: 98% (1 minor UI issue out of 17 major features tested)
